recommendations.title: Super Size Me 2: Holy Chicken!
recommendations.overview: Muckraking filmmaker Morgan Spurlock reignites his battle with the food industry — this time from behind the register — as he opens his own fast food restaurant.

recommendations.title: POM Wonderful Presents: The Greatest Movie Ever Sold
recommendations.overview: A documentary about branding, advertising and product placement that is financed and made possible by brands, advertising and product placement.

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.

recommendations.title: Super Size Me
recommendations.overview: Morgan Spurlock subjects himself to a diet based only on McDonald's fast food three times a day for thirty days without exercising to try to prove why so many Americans are fat or obese. He submits himself to a complete check-up by three doctors, com

recommendations.title: Avicii: True Stories
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the arena-packing Swedish DJ, chronicling his explosive rise to fame and surprising decision to retire from live performances in 2016.

recommendations.title: Freakonomics
recommendations.overview: Some of the world's most innovative documentary filmmakers will explore the hidden side of everything.
recommendations.director: Eugene Jarecki, Heidi Ewing, Alex Gibney, Morgan Spurlock, Seth Gordon, Rachel Grady

recommendations.title: BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky
recommendations.overview: Record-shattering Korean girl band BLACKPINK tell their story —  and detail the hard fought journey of the dreams and trials behind their meteoric rise.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself - Japan Edition
recommendations.overview: BTS perform their Japan concert at Tokyo Dome and Fukuoka Yahuoku Dome during their Love Yourself World Tour.

recommendations.title: Burn the Stage: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Burn the Stage: the Movie is the first movie from BTS, going behind-the-scenes of the BTS WINGS TOUR to reveal the full story of the band’s meteoric rise to fame. This unmissable film provides an intimate look at what happens when the most successful

recommendations.title: One Direction: Where We Are - The Concert Film
recommendations.overview: Where We Are: Live from San Siro Stadium features the entire 23 track concert filmed at San Siro Stadium in Milan in June 2014, as well as 24 minutes of bonus content including backstage footage of One Direction and their crew.
